title: Stock Radar: Eicher Motors stock breaks out of 2-month consolidation phase; what should investors do?
summary: Eicher Motors has broken out of a two-month consolidation phase, with experts suggesting a target of Rs 8,000 for short-term traders. The stock has shown strong upward momentum, trading above key moving averages and exhibiting bullish indicators like the MACD crossover. Analysts recommend accumulating the stock in the ₹7,580–₹7,500 zone with a stop loss at ₹7,300.

title: Tata Agratas inks $530-million EV battery supply pact with JLR
summary: The related-party transaction is expected to help Agratas generate about $42 million ( ₹400 crore) in revenue in FY27.
